analysis.name: Cartesi
analysis.summary: CTSI近期因达到Stage 2安全状态而大涨，但当前DEX流动性极低（仅1415美元），24小时涨幅8%，价格仍处于历史低位。基本面有技术亮点，但市场关注度有限，短期追高风险大。

recommendation.invalidation: 流动性持续低迷或价格跌破0.02美元

catalysts: 达到Stage 2安全状态，提升技术可信度
近期价格大幅上涨（新闻称超100%）吸引投机关注
Binance Launchpad项目背景，社区基础尚存

latestNews.title: Cartesi Price Prediction: CTSI Surges 65% — Can Bulls Break $0.045?
latestNews.reason: 价格上涨引发市场关注，但预测目标价0.045美元较当前价仍有近翻倍空间

latestNews.title: Cartesi price jumps over 100% as it hits Stage 2 security status, can it go higher?
latestNews.reason: Stage 2安全状态是重要技术里程碑，可能吸引长期投资者

latestNews.title: Cartesi Price Prediction 2026, 2027, 2030 & Beyond: Yearly Forecast
latestNews.reason: 长期预测缺乏具体依据，参考价值有限

fundamentals: Cartesi是Layer 2/L3基础设施，允许开发者使用Linux工具构建应用链Rollup
技术包括Cartesi Rollups和Cartesi Machine（RISC-V虚拟机）
代币总量10亿，流通9.28亿，全稀释市值约2356万美元
当前价格较历史高点1.74美元下跌98.67%
项目获得Binance Labs投资，曾通过Binance Launchpad发行
marketRead: 24小时涨幅8.19%，但DEX流动性仅1415美元，交易量极低（182美元），价格容易被操纵
市场深度不足，大额买卖可能导致剧烈波动
risks: DEX流动性极低，滑点大，不适合大资金操作
价格处于长期下跌通道，ATH跌幅超98%，反弹持续性存疑
新闻催化（Stage 2）可能已被消化，后续缺乏新利好
代币供应量较大，解锁风险未知（但已接近全流通）
项目竞争激烈（Arbitrum、Optimism等），市场关注度低
watchlist: 是否有CEX上市或做市商引入
价格能否站稳0.025美元以上
项目进展和开发者活动
sourceNotes: 数据主要来自CoinGecko和DexScreener，DEX数据仅代表Uniswap V2 ETH池，流动性极低
新闻标题显示涨幅超100%，但当前24小时涨幅仅8%，可能已回调
缺乏CEX交易量数据，整体市场深度未知

profile.name: Cartesi
profile.description: About Cartesi (CTSI) Cartesi enables developers to build appchain rollups with any code, while benefiting from the security of Ethereum. It bridges the gap between traditional software and blockchain by bringing decades of mature operating systems, programming languages, libraries, and tools to decentralized applications. Cartesi aims to provide the technological foundation from which builders, entrepreneurs, and projects will develop decentralized applications. The Cartesi technology suite is currently comprised of: Cartesi Rollups: Cartesi Rollups is an app-specific execution environment that can be deployed as a L2, L3, or as sovereign rollups. The combination of an Optimistic Rollups framework and the Cartesi Machine Emulator enables the development of smart contracts and dApps using any package or library that is available for Linux. This allows developers to break free from the scalability limitations of the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM), and brings the rise of a new blockchain era to handle real-life and complex use cases.
